title: Power Sticks
description: A simple mod to add some sticks that launch fireballs, snowballs, or custom darts/arrows depending on the type.
body:
# Description
A simple mod that adds various Power Sticks that shoot fireballs, dragon fireballs, snowballs, or custom darts/arrows depending on their type.

# Dependencies
None! This mod is 100% solo. 

# User Guide
For all the Sticks, just right click on anything to shoot. Hold the right click and it becomes a literal machine gun.
